title: OpenRouter AI Foundation — Unified LLM Layer
description: Migrate all agentic LLM calls to OpenRouter (single API key, model routing) so new AI features stay within funded infra. DigitalOcean hosts the FastAPI app + SMTP; OpenRouter hosts models. Prerequisite for Resume Insights, Morning Brief, and Autopilot. OUT OF SCOPE: Cloudflare Workers, Exa for new features, direct Gemini/OpenAI keys for new code paths.

userStories.title: OpenRouter config and shared client module
userStories.description:
Add OpenRouter as the canonical LLM provider for agent features.

**Config** (`backend/config.py`):
- `openrouter_api_key: str = ""`
- `openrouter_base_url: str = "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1"`
- `openrouter_default_model: str = "google/gemini-2.0-flash-001"`

**New module** `backend/ai/openrouter_client.py`:
- `get_openrouter_client() -> AsyncOpenAI` using openai SDK with OpenRouter base URL
- `async def complete_json(system, user, *, model=None, temperature=0.3, max_tokens=500, timeout=15.0) -> dict` — strips markdown fences, parses JSON

Update `.env.example` with `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`. Keep legacy GEMINI/OPENAI keys for backward compat during migration.
acceptanceCriteria: Config fields openrouter_api_key, openrouter_base_url, openrouter_default_model added
File under 120 lines, type annotations on all functions
userStories.notes: OpenRouter config, ai/openrouter_client.py, tests/test_openrouter_client.py (6 passed). Commit 39438ea.

userStories.title: Migrate email classifier and fit score to OpenRouter
userStories.description:
Replace direct Gemini calls with OpenRouter in classifier.py, fit_score.py, and generate_follow_up_draft in router.py.

Fallback: if openrouter_api_key set use OpenRouter; elif legacy gemini_api_key set keep existing path; else None/503.

Do NOT migrate interview prep agent loop (uses Exa tools) in this story.
acceptanceCriteria: classifier.py, fit_score.py, follow-up draft use OpenRouter when configured
userStories.notes: classifier, fit_score, follow-up draft migrated. 15/15 unit tests pass; interview_prep_router HTTP tests have pre-existing event loop issues. Commit 6a25b7d.

userStories.title: Extend ai_cache quota layer to OpenRouter calls
userStories.description: Extend parsing/ai_cache.py so OpenRouter agent calls share budget + per-user daily quota. Wire into fit_score and follow-up draft when user_id available. Classifier uses global budget only.
acceptanceCriteria: Per-user quota on fit_score and follow-up draft
userStories.notes: ai_cache openrouter provider, quota on fit_score/follow-up, budget on classifier. 30/30 tests pass. Commit 2f10f7c.

userStories.title: Unify fit score display across list and detail views
userStories.description: Add backend/applications/fit_display.py get_display_fit() preferring ai_analysis then fit_score. Update ApplicationRow.jsx and KanbanCard.jsx to use unified score. Read-time merge only, no schema migration.
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationRow and KanbanCard show score from either field
